title: 🧨Marketing and events - New Year, New career 🧨
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

AXISREACH ORGANIZATION is a dynamic events and sales company that thrives on creativity and energy. Our young and vibrant team brings fresh ideas to the table, ensuring every project is as bold and exciting as the next. Here, we don’t just market products or drive sales—we create moments that stick.

Let’s make magic happen!

Job Summary

Kick off the New Year with a role that builds confidence, communication, and career momentum. Join our Marketing & Events team to work on live campaigns, roadshows, and brand activations while learning valuable marketing and people skills. No experience required — full training provided.🚀

Responsibilities

  • Support and execute marketing and event campaigns to increase brand awareness and customer engagement
  • Represent brands at events and promotional activities to create memorable and positive customer interactions
  • Engage customers directly to deliver positive brand experiences and encourage participation
  • Collaborate with mentors to develop marketing, communication, and event management skills through hands-on learning

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Motivation to learn and adapt in a fast-paced, people-oriented environment
  • Openness to stepping out of comfort zones to grow professionally
  • Suitable for fresh graduates and career switchers seeking growth opportunities

postedCompany.description:
At AxisReach Recruitment Organisation, we’re not just another sales and marketing company — we’re a growing team of passionate people who believe in creating real connections and delivering real results.

We work closely with some of the biggest names in the service industry, helping them reach their audience through a face-to-face marketing approach that’s proven, personal, and effective. By being on the ground and truly engaging with people, we build stronger brand reputations and long-lasting customer relationships.

What drives us is simple: passion, commitment, and the belief that great products and services deserve to be seen, experienced, and appreciated. Whether it’s working with businesses, professionals, or everyday consumers, we bring energy and integrity to everything we do.

Our team is what makes AxisReach stand out. We’re a diverse, motivated group with shared values and a common goal — to grow together, support one another, and go above and beyond for our clients
postedCompany.name: AXISREACH RECRUITMENT

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
